name: Bedrock_DeFi
report: The attacker exploited an incorrect exchange rate calculation in the mint function (specifically within the _amounts sub-logic) of the Bedrock Vault. By taking a flash loan of 30.8 WETH and depositing it, the flawed logic calculated the mintable uniBTC amount using an improper divisor (1e10), resulting in a highly inflated exchange rate of 1 WETH to 1 uniBTC (instead of the correct 1:1e-8). The attacker then swapped the overvalued uniBTC for WBTC and finally back to WETH, netting a profit of 649.6 WETH (~$1.7 million) after repaying the loan.
